scripts.dev: sh -c 'pnpm dev:backend & backend_pid=$!; trap "kill $backend_pid" EXIT INT TERM; pnpm dev:web'
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter refcheckid-backend test:unit && pnpm --filter refcheckid-web test:unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter refcheckid-backend test:integration && pnpm --filter refcheckid-web test:integration
